# IDENTISITE

IDENTISITE is a Georgian web agency website focused on:
- Corporate websites
- E-commerce websites
- UI/UX design
- SEO optimization
- Admin dashboards

Primary language: Georgian (`ka`), with English toggle (`en`).

Canonical site:
- https://identisite.imed.com.ge/

Primary pages:
- https://identisite.imed.com.ge/
- https://identisite.imed.com.ge/about.html
- https://identisite.imed.com.ge/services.html
- https://identisite.imed.com.ge/portfolio.html
- https://identisite.imed.com.ge/process.html
- https://identisite.imed.com.ge/blog.html
- https://identisite.imed.com.ge/contact.html
- https://identisite.imed.com.ge/privacy.html
- https://identisite.imed.com.ge/terms.html
- https://identisite.imed.com.ge/news-8-marti.html

Brand assets:
- Logo: /identisite.png
- Favicons: /favicon.ico, /favicon-32x32.png, /favicon-192x192.png, /apple-touch-icon.png

Contact:
- Email: info@identisite.ge
- Phone: +995 555 123 456
- Location: Tbilisi, Georgia
